source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The switches T1 and T2 in <image> (a) are switched in a complementary fashion with sinusoidal pulse width modulation technique. The modulating voltage \( v_m(t) = 0.8 \sin(200\pi t) V \) and the triangular carrier voltage \( v_c \) are as shown in <image> (b). The carrier frequency is 5 kHz. The peak value of the 100 Hz component of the load current \( i_L \), in ampere, is ______.
